violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink, as the test strips on site expired in 2022. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/22/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023

Yogurt & granola parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Parfaits were removed from self-service case, and are not to be placed there until complete labels have been provided. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
Labels were not removed and apples not washed before placing on the service line. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025
The 3 door freezer is in poor repair, with water pooling on the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2024

Sanitizer bucket and scouring pad were observed in the hand-washing sink in the dishwasher area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The hand-washing sink in the dishwasher area was lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands must be posted at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

Beef and cheese delivered at 103-108 degrees F. Proper temperatures must be maintained during delivery. 135 degrees or above F for hot food. 41 degrees F or below for cold food. Person delivering the food stated it was for tomorrow, and was brought over to cool. This facility has inadequate refrigeration for cooling substantial amounts of food. Beef & cheese was transported back to the high school to cool in the walk in freezer. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The freezer in the back delivery area was not in good repair, with water pooling underneath it. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice cream chest have an accumulation of frost and debris. The non-food contact surfaces of the utensil storage bins, and some of the utensils in them have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
The freezer located in the back area was not in good repair, with water pooling on the floor beneath. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
No person in charge was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Employee observed grazing on food when passing a food prep table. Proper hygienic practices must be followed by food employees in performing assigned duties to ensure the safety of the food, prevent the introduction of foreign objects into the food, and minimize the possibility of transmitting disease through food. Smoking or eating by employees in food preparation areas is prohibited because of the potential that the hands, food, and food-contact surfaces may become contaminated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Sanitizer logs are to be maintained daily. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Frozen meatballs were only heated to 110 degrees Fahrenheit before being placed into hot holding. Ready to eat foods taken from a commercially processed can or intact package from a food processing plant must be heated to at least 135 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Hamburgers observed held at 103 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Hamburgers were reheated. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

Yogurt & granola parfaits, and turkey & cheese sandwiches observed held at 48-55 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Items were placed in refrigerator to chill. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024
The 3 door freezer in the back area was not in good repair, with water dripping on the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2024
A hot hold unit on the line was not in good repair, with a light bulb or heating element not functioning. New Violation. Correct By: 10/11/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:freezerutensil drawercan opener baseportable fanwall-mounted fanThe chest freezer has an accumulation of frost & debrisThe milk units have an accumulation of ice and water New Violation. Correct By: 10/01/2024

The floors in the back freezer area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager. Once certificate is obtained, PIC to apply for state licensure. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2024
Faucet at 3 bay sink observed leaking. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. PIC to forward proof of food safety certificate and state licensure to inspector once obtained. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2023
Faucet at 3 bay sink observed leaking. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 11/26/2023
